violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Clean the hot hold cabinets and the cold reach in on the line.
Plumbing system. — --Repair the leak on the spray hose at the three comp sink.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. - The front hand sink was out of paper towels.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Clean the floors beloow the fryers.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
